# Godhans Tree Company

> Veteran-owned tree care company serving Jacksonville, NC and Eastern North Carolina since 2020. Founded by Michael Godbersen, a U.S. military veteran. Licensed, insured, and BBB A+ rated.

## Business Overview

Godhans is a full-service tree and outdoor services company based in Jacksonville, NC. The company was founded in 2020 by Michael Godbersen, a veteran, who applies military-grade discipline and precision to every job. Godhans serves residential and commercial customers across Eastern NC with a 5.0 Google rating and a team of certified arborists.

## Services

- **Tree Removal**: Safe, controlled removal of any tree — diseased, dead, or hazardous. Crews use large-format boom trucks and follow strict safety protocols. Emergency and standard removal available.
- **Tree Trimming & Pruning**: Arborist-led crown thinning, pruning, crown raising, shaping, and dead branch removal. Done at the right time of year to maintain tree health.
- **Stump Grinding**: Ground-level stump removal with full debris cleanup. Any stump size.
- **Emergency & Storm Cleanup**: 24/7 emergency response for fallen trees, storm damage, and hazard removal.
- **Land Clearing & Demolition**: Full lot clearing, rough grading, ditch and excavation work, demolition, and professional crane service.
- **Tree Health Assessment**: Free tree health assessments by certified arborists. Diagnosis, treatment recommendations, and ongoing care.

## Service Area

Primary base: Jacksonville, NC (4445 Gum Branch Rd, Jacksonville, NC 28540)

Cities served: Jacksonville, Topsail, Hampstead, Holly Ridge, Swansboro, Havelock, Morehead City, Emerald Isle, Kinston, Richlands, and surrounding Eastern North Carolina communities.

## Key Facts

- Founded: March 2020
- Owner: Michael Godbersen (veteran)
- Phone: (618) 704-4861
- Address: 4445 Gum Branch Rd, Jacksonville, NC 28540
- Website: https://godhandstreeservice.com
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- BBB Rating: A+
- Licensed & insured: Yes (liability and workers' compensation)
- Emergency service: 24/7
- Free estimates: Yes

## Differentiators

- Veteran-owned and operated — most crew members are veterans
- Arborist-led crews on all trimming and pruning work
- Complete property cleanup included on every job
- Takes on jobs other companies won't — specialty equipment and professional climbers
- No job too big or small
- Free tree health assessments
